org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Interface Command

  • All Superinterfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractCommand, BaseCommand

    public interface Command
extends java.lang.AutoCloseable
    A command that can be executed by the ERSAP shell.

    The CommandUtils class provides helper methods to wrap existing CLI programs as subprocesses that will be started when executing the command.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int EXIT_ERROR
      Exit status for failed execution.
      static int EXIT_SUCCESS
      Exit status for successful execution.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int execute(java.lang.String[] args)
      Executes the command with the give arguments.
      org.jline.reader.Completer getCompleter()
      Gets a completer to generate tab-completion candidates of this command and its arguments.
      java.lang.String getDescription()
      Gets a brief explanation of what the command does.
      java.lang.String getName()
      Gets the name of the command.
      void printHelp(java.io.PrintWriter printer)
      Prints a detailed description of what the command does.

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.AutoCloseable

        close

    • Field Detail

      • EXIT_SUCCESS

        static final int EXIT_SUCCESS
        Exit status for successful execution.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • EXIT_ERROR

        static final int EXIT_ERROR
        Exit status for failed execution.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • execute

        int execute(java.lang.String[] args)
        Executes the command with the give arguments. The command must support being interrupted by the user (by interrupting the caller thread).
        Parameters:
        args - the command arguments. The command name is not part of the arguments.
        Returns:
        the exit status of the execution

      • getName

        java.lang.String getName()
        Gets the name of the command.
        Returns:
        the name

      • getDescription

        java.lang.String getDescription()
        Gets a brief explanation of what the command does. More detailed information should be provided with printHelp(java.io.PrintWriter).
        Returns:
        a short description of the command

      • getCompleter

        org.jline.reader.Completer getCompleter()
        Gets a completer to generate tab-completion candidates of this command and its arguments.
        Returns:
        the completer for the command

      • printHelp

        void printHelp(java.io.PrintWriter printer)
        Prints a detailed description of what the command does.
        Parameters:
        printer - where to print the help text
